markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.351 — Applicability

The color, mounting, and visibility requirements in this subchapter apply only to equipment on a vehicle described by Section 547.352 (Additional Lighting Equipment Requirements) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The color, mounting, and visibility requirements in this subchapter apply only to equipment on a vehicle described by Section 547.352 (Additional Lighting Equipment Requirements) .
